title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.101 - Employees may request monthly pay
text:
33.101.  Employees may request monthly pay. — This act* shall not apply to any state employee desiring to be paid by the month.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1266 § B) 
*"This act" (H.B. 1266, 1980) contained numerous sections.  Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
